text.tspan: Country ranking of liberal democracy weighted by population, 2021
Based on the expert assessments and index by V-Dem. It combines information on voting rights, the freedom and
fairness of elections, freedoms of association and expression, civil liberties, and executive constraints. It ranges
Source: OWID based on V-Dem (v12), Gapminder (v6), HYDE (v3.2), UN (2019)
